query:
ALTER TABLE payroll_records
  ADD COLUMN agentCode VARCHAR(100) NULL AFTER candidateId,
  ADD COLUMN baseSalary DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN workingHours DECIMAL(8,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN overtimeHours DECIMAL(8,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN commission DECIMAL(10,2) NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN uploadedBy VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN uploadedAt BIGINT NULL;

  ADD COLUMN overtimeHours DECIMAL(8,2) NULL,

  ADD COLUMN uploadedBy VARCHAR(255) NULL,
